title: Jojo's Toybox
description: JoJo's Toybox adds a ton of miscellaneous ideas that are too small for their own mods!
body:
JoJo's Toybox makes Minecraft 1000x funnier

Hello and Welcome to Jojo's Toybox! This is the mod for all of my miscellaneous ideas that are too small for their own mods!

This mod includes:

[b1.0+] - Rideable Players! (Right-click any player to ride them!)

[b1.0+] - Rideable Entities! (Right-click any entity to ride them!)

[b1.0+] - Explosive Sneak! (Explode when sneaking!)

[b1.0+] - Ender Spear! (Throw Ender pearls faster and further!)

[b1.0+] - Pocket Sand! (Throw into your enemies eyes!) (Bugged in b1.0!)

[b1.0+] - Pet Rock! (Gives rock puns and answers questions when sneaking!)

[b1.0+] - Buzz Buzzer! (Buzz in like never before!)

[b1.1+] - Record Player! (Plays a random Vanilla music disc in a much shorter radius!)

[b1.1+] - Garlic Bread! (It's like bread but it's always edible and gives twice the saturation!)

[b1.1+] - Portal Radio! (The Portal Radio from the Portal series, playing everyone's favorite tune!)

[b1.1+] - TNT Bat! (Yeet your enemies away with an explosive landing!)

[b1.1+] - Impractical Iron Sword! (It literally does more damage to you than to them!)

[b1.1+] - Beans! (The fun new food that will spice up your world, hiding in grass near you!)

[b1.1+] - Bean Block! (Compacted beans!)

[b1.1+] - Beanified Iron Sword! (That's disgusting!)

[b1.1.1+] - Super Bean Boy! (A companion that shoots beans at your enemies!)

[b1.1.1+] - Bat of banishment! (A bat that deletes entities from existence!)

[b1.1.1+] - A Cantaloupe! (A hint towards the popular Youtuber Yahiamice!)

Known bugs:

N/A

1.19.2: STS: "Short Term Support" 

1.19.4: ???: ???

Do note that this is the plan but things may change overtime!

FAQ:

1. [thingy] doesn't work! - You most likely forgot to enable it in the config. If not feel free to submit a bug-report in the Discord.
